prompt: A long, narrow corridor stretches into the distance, its concrete floor cracked and littered with small patches of green weeds. On either side, rusted metal railings stand at intervals, their surfaces weathered and stained. The walls are made of large, gray panels, many of which are peeling away to reveal a lighter, rougher material beneath. Above, a series of fluorescent lights hang from the ceiling, casting a cool, dim glow that highlights the decay. At the far end, a set of stairs ascends toward a brighter, green-lit opening, suggesting an exit or another level. An old, abandoned arcade machine stands on the left, its screen dark and its casing covered in grime. The entire scene feels quiet and forgotten, as if time has stood still within this underground passage.
